title: MR.SIGA Durable Long Handle Fly Swatter, 6 Pack, Gray
features: Made of durable plastic, portable and flexible, easy to swat flies, mosquitoes, spiders and more pests. MR.SIGA flyswatter will not scratch or damage your household surfaces. Simply swat, scoop up the pest and flick it into the trash can.
Swatting area of fly swatter: 4.4 x 4.9 inch (11.2 x 12.5 cm) which allows you to swat various pests not only flying flies, mosquitoes, but also crawling insects.
Length of swatter: 17 inch (43 cm) long handle makes it easy to swat a fly even at a long distance. Handle is designed to fit any hands, comfortable and easy to grip.

MR.SIGA heavy duty manual fly swatter is great for using in kitchen, patio, office, classroom, patios and more. And this portable fly swatter can be hung easily with the hanging loop and it won't take up any space. It also can be stored in a cabinet if needed.

MR.SIGA's mission: Make your housework easier, and make the world cleaner. If you’re not happy about the product, you’re covered by a full refund. Please do not hesitate to contact us with any questions you may have, we are here for support and advice!
description: Product Description Previous page MR.SIGA Heavy Duty Long Handle Fly Swatter Pack of 6 pieces Ergonomic Design for Effortless Use · The handle provides a comfortable grip, making it easy for people to use. · The longer reach and lightweight design enable you to easily swat flies in high without feeling fatigued. Next page Six-Pack Fly Swatters With six swatters in one set, you'll always have a spare on hand, making it easy to maintain a clean and comfortable environment. Flexible and Durable Material The PP and PE blend makes the fly swatter flexible and durable, with a bendable handle for versatile swatting angles. Efficient Mesh Design The head features a mesh design that reduces air resistance, allowing for quick and effective swats at flies and improving the hit rate. Hangable Handle The hole allows for easy hanging on hooks, pegs, or nails, keeping the fly swatter within reach and off the cluttered countertops or drawers. What is the design feature of the head of fly swatters? The heads of these fly swatters feature a mesh design, which helps in trapping flies effectively. What is the primary material of fly swatters? These fly swatters are made from durable plastic, ensuring longevity and effective. Are these fly swatters easy to grip? Yes, each fly swatter has an ergonomic handle designed for a comfortable and secure grip. Are the fly swatters suitable for outdoor use? Yes, the durable construction of fly swatters makes them suitable for both indoor and outdoor.
